response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and demonstrated leadership in open-source and distributed systems, including event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of executive-level leadership in fintech, multi-agent AI at scale, or regulated financial systems — critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, scalable systems with real-time data handling.
Active contribution to agentic AI tooling (MCP frameworks) and open-source infrastructure.
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and ship complex systems across domains.
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ in a scale-up fintech context.
Lacks demonstrated production experience with financial risk, credit systems, or regulatory compliance infrastructure.
No clear track record of architecting model-agnostic, stateful multi-agent frameworks in high-stakes commercial environments.
